title: Item Description [Beta] - Add this as part of the column

posts.author: iziel (Iziel)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new Item Description [Beta] in the Item View is amazing. It would be very helpful if;

  1. The Item Description is also available in the column for a brief overview.

  2. Automation that would allow for the Item Description to be automatically added in the Update section, that way the details is captured without getting deleted
